name: Buddy
description: Monitor Buddy CI/CD pipelines for automated build, test, and deployment compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Buddy at https://app.buddy.works
2. Go to Profile → Personal Access Tokens
3. Generate a new token with workspace and pipeline scopes
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: Personal Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Buddy Profile → Personal Access Tokens

checks.name: Code Changes
checks.description: Verifies Buddy CI/CD pipelines are configured to automate code deployments

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies Buddy account is active with authorized team members
